title: Wands Weapons Wreckage Pack

body:
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/g_Q9i6cc4T0" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

💥 This Minecraft mod is packed with awesome new gear and crazy fun items! From a TNT-Blasting Wand that blows things up in style, to a Magic Spellbook that fires powerful projectiles, there’s no shortage of ways to cause chaos. You’ll also get your hands on a customizable pistol with unique ammo types, an edible cup that gives you special buffs, and so much more. If you’re ready to take your Minecraft adventures to the next level, this mod’s got you covered!
